unlockHint.cpqExplorer: Extract data from your source org to unlock

connectionCards.noTargetDescription: Connect your Revenue Cloud Advanced org to deploy migrated configurations.
connectionCards.noSourceDescription: Connect your Salesforce CPQ org to begin the migration analysis.

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.noActivityDescription: Activity will appear here as you work on your project.

connectSource.title: Connect your source Salesforce org
connectSource.description: Start by connecting the Salesforce org that contains your CPQ configuration. We'll analyze it to plan your migration.

extractData.title: Extract your CPQ data
extractData.description: Your source org is connected. Run a data extraction to analyze your CPQ configuration and records.

connectTarget.title: Connect your target org
connectTarget.description: Your assessment is complete. Connect your Revenue Cloud Advanced org to start deploying migrated configurations.

complete.title: Migration complete
complete.description: All migration steps are done. Your CPQ configuration has been successfully migrated to Revenue Cloud Advanced.

cpqExplorer.title: CPQ Explorer
cpqExplorer.heading: Explore your CPQ data
cpqExplorer.description: Once you extract data from your source org, you'll see a detailed breakdown of all CPQ objects, fields, and records here.
cpqExplorer.locked: Extract data from your source org to unlock the CPQ Explorer.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.heading: Migration readiness assessment
assessment.description: After data extraction, RevBrain analyzes your CPQ configuration to determine migration compatibility and effort estimates.
assessment.locked: Complete data extraction to unlock the Assessment.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.heading: Deploy to Revenue Cloud
deployment.description: When your assessment is complete and target org connected, you'll manage deployment runs, track progress, and validate results here.
deployment.locked: Complete the assessment and connect your target org to unlock Deployment.

runs.title: Runs
runs.heading: Extraction & migration runs
runs.description: Track all extraction, assessment, deployment, and validation runs. View logs, performance metrics, and error details.
runs.noRuns: No runs yet. Start an extraction from the Overview page.

issues.title: Issues
issues.heading: Migration issues & warnings
issues.description: Review blockers, warnings, and informational notes found during assessment. Resolve issues to proceed with deployment.
issues.noIssues: No issues found. Your migration is looking clean.

team.title: Team
team.heading: Project team
team.description: Manage who has access to this project, assign roles, and control permissions for migration operations.

activity.title: Activity
activity.heading: Project activity log
activity.description: A chronological record of all actions taken in this project — connections, extractions, assessments, deployments, and team changes.
activity.noActivity: No activity yet. Events will appear here as you work on the project.

artifacts.title: Artifacts & Docs
artifacts.heading: Project artifacts & documentation
artifacts.description: Access generated reports, migration plans, mapping documents, and uploaded reference materials for this project.
artifacts.noArtifacts: No artifacts yet. Reports will be generated as you progress through the migration.
